title: Contract Lifecycle Intelligence
description: AI contract lifecycle management: extract clauses/dates, auto-flag risk, renewal calendar, benchmark vs market terms, amendment tracker across 200+ contract types.
features: Clause extraction with 200+ contract type templates
Auto renewal calendar + amendment tracker + approval chain
Benchmark pricing/T&Cs vs anonymised peer market medians
Obligation tracker with 90/30/7-day pre-renewal reminders
benefits: Cut contract review time by 75%
Never miss renewal windows — alerts start 90 days early
Negotiate using anonymised industry peer data
Full audit trail — every change, version, approval timestamped

title: Fintech Fraud Graph
description: Real-time fraud detection as a knowledge graph: entity resolution across accounts/IP/device/card/email fingerprints; ML scoring per transaction <15ms; SAR/CTR auto-draft; global rule engine for SWIFT/SEPA/instant-payments.
features: Entity resolution graph across accounts/IP/devices/cards/emails
Real-time ML scoring per transaction in under 15ms
SAR/CTR auto-draft — zero manual compliance data entry
Global rule engine per jurisdiction and instant-payment scheme
benefits: Detect synthetic-identity fraud 30-60 days earlier
Reduce false positives 40%+ with graph relationship analysis
Auto-generated SAR reduces compliance processing time by 80%
Edge scoring <15ms means no user-facing checkout delay

title: Cross-Lingual Meeting Bridge
description: Multi-language meeting support: real-time simultaneous interpretation for 40+ languages/dialects, live bilingual captions, cultural-adaptation annotations, silent-watch spectator mode, executive summary auto-generation.
features: Simultaneous interpretation across 40+ languages and dialects per meeting
Live bilingual captions with timestamped per-speaker transcript
Cultural-adaptation annotations — politeness norms and idiom equivalents
Silent-watch spectator mode + auto-generated executive summary
benefits: Run one meeting that serves every team worldwide
Full mixed-language participation without manual switching
Cultural nuance layer reduces post-meeting misalignment
Transcripts indexed in knowledge base — searchable forever

title: Sustainable Supply Chain Radar
description: Supply-chain ESG platform: per-tier carbon intensity, green-alternative sourcing score, Scope 3 quantification, regulatory dashboard (CSRD CBAM, EU Deforestation Reg), penalty simulator per scenario.
features: Supplier-scope carbon database from tier-1 to tier-n with Scope 3 quantification
Green-alternative sourcing score vs. cost-impact tradeoff analysis
CSRD/CBAM/EU Deforestation Reg compliant auto-reports
Regulatory penalty simulator — cost-of-non-compliance per scenario
benefits: Scope 3 live dashboard instead of spreadsheets
Find greener alternatives with tradeoff analysis in 1 click
80% reduction on regulatory report prep hours
Show C-suite cost-of-inaction before sign-off

title: Predictive Maintenance Advisor
description: Asset RUL prediction: sensor-fusion across vibration/thermal/acoustic/power, plain-English root-cause analysis, part/vendor recommendation, HSE safety-risk layer. Maintenance managers use it in plain language.
features: Multimodal sensor fusion — vibration, thermal, acoustic, and current
Remaining-Useful-Life (RUL) distribution with 3-severity flag per asset
Plain-English root cause + part + vendor recommendation
HSE safety-risk layer assessed before scheduling maintenance
benefits: Predict failures 14-90 days ahead with 85%+ accuracy
No more surprise downtime dispatches
Root-cause narrative for maintenance crews without data science degree
HSE layer prevents safety incidents from maintenance decisions

title: Knowledge Graph Search Engine
description: Semantic graph search from siloed docs/DBs/APIs: entity extraction/disambiguation, NL query rewriter, cited ranked answers. Search across 50+ connected tools with primary-source footnotes.
features: Multi-source entity/relation extractor — PDF/Notion/Slack/DB/API
Entity disambiguation + canonical identity store
NL query rewriter — 'who reported this bug?' → graph query
Answer + primary-source footnote + timestamp per result
benefits: Find answers in under 5 seconds vs. 6 hours searching
Single answer surface across all silos
Graph context prevents hallucinations — every claim is source-cited
Auto-crawl keeps knowledge base fresh without manual curation
